text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're a few days from the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling good again... Actually, I might even be
in better shape than before my injury.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But... the time it took to confirm that—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, girlie! What's the dealio? ♪ Has something
got you down?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well then, you're lucky that your raddest,
baddest upperclassmen just happened to pass by!
What's eating at you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: M-Maruzen?! What are you—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Lemme guess—you're worried because you're
jumping right back into the racing world without a
parachute, riiight?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Let's see if we can't turn that frown upside-down
with a pair run! If nothing else, you'll get a solid
idea of your current condish.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Really? You'd do that for me?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Of course! It's all good! ♪ I'd do anything for my
sweet little Chiyo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you for running with me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...I'm floored over here. You must've worked your
butt off to get back into such awesome shape.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You've done so well, Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Well, I've got people waiting for me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
People who taught me—through their
running—that limits can be surpassed over and
over.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
They have faith that I'll make my return to the
turf.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
They're my rivals. They mean the world to me,
and there's no one else like them.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I have done well, then... I think it's thanks to
them.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Whoa.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like you've got some totally sweet rivals.
...I'm actually getting a little jelly here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: H-huh?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm just pulling your leg! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen... Go run like there's no
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And remember to have fun racing against your
rivals! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...! Yeah! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the day of the Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we're in for another crazy good
Takarazuka Kinen this year! Hmm, I'm guessing
it'll probably be Mejiro Ardan or Yaeno Muteki in
first.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget that Inari One's running, though.
With all the hype she's been generating, anything
could happen!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good point! This race's gonna be close for
sure. Plus, there's that one other racer—y'know,
the one who announced she was aiming for the
Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm Sakura Chiyono O, and today, I'm going to
blow the competition away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: We finally meet again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Patience is bitter, but its fruit is sweet... while it's
fresh. Sorry to have kept you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Not at all... I'm just truly delighted that you've
made it here today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You appear to be in excellent form.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I cannot wait to compete with you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Today's going to mark more than just my return
to racing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's going to be the day I surpass my limits and
defeat you both!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Spoken like a true rival of ours.

Whoa there! This is quite the lineup we've got
here!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I know it's kinda rude of me to come barging in on
this emotional reunion... but I saw you all raring
to go and just couldn't help myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Inari!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Inari has recently and rapidly made a name for
herself as one of the great racers of our time,
alongside Oguri and Creek.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You guys look like you're about to put up a real
fight. It's gettin' me all fired up!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'll take down all of ya. Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Her claims are more than mere bravado. There's
an unusual intensity about her that's similar to
that of Oguri's!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (However...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Right back at you. Upon my name as Yaeno
Muteki, I will face you with all my might!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Don't count me out either! Underestimate me and
I'll make you eat your words!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(Not a single one of us is about to back down. On
the contrary, we're brimming with joy at the
prospect of fresh and fierce competition!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Let's have ourselves the race of a lifetime. But do
bear in mind, I shall be the one to emerge
victorious!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Well, well! You're all packing more
pluck than I'd imagined!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Let's set the Hanshin racecourse ablaze with our
fireworks!
